x.description: The number of consecutive years that must be sampled until a dry (drought) year is observed; in this problem x=3.

p_drought.description: The probability of observing a drought year in any given year, used in the geometric distribution formula p(x)=(.3)(.7)^{x-1}.

p_no_drought.description: The probability of observing a non-drought year in any given year (complement of p_drought), used in the geometric distribution formula p(x)=(.3)(.7)^{x-1}.
